title: API Rate Limiting Policy Update — Enterprise Tier (2026-Q1)
body:
1. POLICY SCOPE AND EFFECTIVE DATE

This internal policy documents an update to TechCorp's API Rate Limiting Policy, effective immediately upon approval. This amendment applies to all customers provisioned on the Enterprise tier of our SaaS API offering, as well as internal development and testing environments.

2. RATE LIMIT ADJUSTMENT — ENTERPRISE TIER

Effective as of March 1, 2026, the API rate limit for Enterprise tier customers is increased from 1,000 requests per minute (req/min) to 5,000 requests per minute (req/min). This change reflects our platform's enhanced infrastructure capacity and aligns with customer demand for higher-throughput integrations. Standard and Premium tier rate limits remain unchanged at their current levels and are not affected by this amendment.

3. IMPLEMENTATION AND TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

The new 5,000 req/min limit applies to all Enterprise tier API keys and will be enforced via our rate-limiting gateway at the request ingestion layer. Clients will continue to receive standard HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) responses when exceeding their allocated quota, along with a Retry-After header indicating the time in seconds before requests may be retried. Rate limits are calculated on a rolling one-minute window using a token bucket algorithm to ensure fair distribution of capacity across concurrent clients within an account.

4. CUSTOMER NOTIFICATION AND TRANSITION

All Enterprise tier customers will be notified of this rate limit increase via email from our Customer Success team. No action is required by customers to benefit from the new limit—it will be automatically applied to all existing Enterprise tier API credentials. Customers who wish to discuss their specific throughput requirements or request further customization are encouraged to contact their account representative.
